name: Cucumber Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cucumber into small cubes.
2. Chill the cucumber on crushed ice until ready to use.
3. In a bowl, mix sour cream, mayonnaise, juice from one lemon, salt, and white pepper to taste.
4. Add chopped onion to the mixture.
5. When ready to serve, drain and dry the cucumber, then pour the sauce over it.
6. Refrigerate before serving. Delicious on cold lobster, crabmeat, or shrimp.
